nav.servicesOverview: Full-service delivery across the project lifecycle — from feasibility to handover.

hero.title: Building the Infrastructure of Tomorrow
hero.subtitle: Constructivegroup.az delivers world-class construction, engineering and project management services across commercial, industrial and public infrastructure — engineered to international standards, built to last generations.

home.aboutTitle: Two decades of engineering excellence, delivered on every continent
home.aboutBody: Constructivegroup.az is an international construction, engineering and project management firm headquartered in Baku, delivering complex infrastructure, commercial and industrial projects across 18 countries. We combine rigorous engineering discipline with world-class project controls to deliver certainty on cost, schedule and quality.
home.whyBody: From pre-construction planning to final handover, our integrated teams deliver measurable outcomes across quality, safety and value engineering.
home.servicesTitle: Full-service delivery across the project lifecycle
home.servicesBody: An integrated platform of construction, engineering and advisory services — designed to remove risk from every phase of your project.
home.projectsBody: Landmark developments across commercial, industrial, infrastructure and public sectors — delivered on time, on budget, to international standards.
home.processTitle: A disciplined process, refined over 350+ projects
home.qualityBody: Our integrated management systems are certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001, underpinned by a zero-harm safety culture.
home.partnersTitle: Partners and clients who build with confidence
home.ctaBody: Tell us about your vision — our team will respond within one business day with next steps.

about.title: Engineering trust since 2004
about.intro: We are an international construction, engineering and project management group delivering complex, high-value projects across the Caucasus, Central Asia, the Middle East and Europe.
about.mission: To deliver the built environment our clients envision — safely, on schedule, and to the highest international standards of engineering quality.
about.vision: To be the most trusted construction and engineering partner across the regions we serve, recognised for integrity, innovation and technical excellence.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.body: We do what we say — transparent reporting, honest timelines, and accountability at every level.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.body: We hold ourselves to international standards of engineering and craftsmanship on every project, regardless of size.

safety.title: Safety
safety.body: Every person on our sites goes home safe, every day — a non-negotiable commitment across all operations.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.body: We build long-term partnerships with clients, consultants and communities, not just structures.

quality.title: Quality
quality.body: Rigorous QA/QC frameworks and ISO-certified processes govern every stage of delivery.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.body: BIM, digital twins and lean construction methods reduce risk and accelerate schedules.

safety.title: Safety
safety.body: A zero-harm culture backed by ISO 45001 certification and rigorous site protocols.

planning.title: Planning
planning.body: Detailed front-end planning and cost control that protects your budget and timeline.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.body: Multidisciplinary engineering teams delivering technically sound, buildable design.

delivery.title: Project Delivery
delivery.body: Integrated project controls ensuring certainty of cost, schedule and quality outcomes.

services.title: Full-service delivery, end to end
services.intro: From feasibility through to facility handover, our integrated services remove risk and add value at every stage of the project lifecycle.
services.ctaBody: Speak with our specialists about how this service can be tailored to your project.

projects.title: Projects engineered for permanence
projects.intro: A portfolio of landmark developments across commercial, industrial, residential, infrastructure, healthcare, hospitality, government and education sectors.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.body: We start by understanding your vision, constraints and success criteria.

planning.title: Planning
planning.body: Feasibility, budgeting and risk assessment define a clear delivery roadmap.

design.title: Design
design.body: Multidisciplinary design development, coordinated through BIM.

construction.title: Construction
construction.body: Disciplined site execution governed by rigorous project controls.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.body: Continuous inspection, testing and commissioning against international standards.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Structured handover with complete documentation and training.

support.title: Support
support.body: Post-handover facilities support and warranty management.

quality.title: Certified systems. Uncompromising standards.
quality.intro: Our integrated management system governs quality, environmental and occupational health & safety performance across every project, in every country we operate.
quality.hseBody: We are committed to a zero-harm workplace, achieved through rigorous risk management, continuous training and a culture where every employee has the authority to stop unsafe work.
quality.qualityPolicyBody: Every project is delivered under a certified quality management system, with independent audits, structured inspection and test plans, and continuous improvement.
quality.environmentBody: We minimise environmental impact through responsible resource management, waste reduction and sustainable construction methods across all operations.

partners.title: Partners and clients across the globe

news.title: News & Insights
news.intro: Company announcements, project milestones and perspectives from our engineering and leadership teams.

careers.title: Build your career with us
careers.intro: We are always looking for talented engineers, project managers and construction professionals who share our commitment to excellence.
careers.noOpenings: No open positions in this department right now — send us your CV and we'll be in touch.

contact.title: Let's build something exceptional
contact.intro: Reach out to discuss your project, request a proposal, or connect with a member of our team.

cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.body: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyse site traffic and personalise content. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.
cookie.necessaryBody: Required for the site to function. Always active.
cookie.analyticsBody: Helps us understand how visitors interact with the site.
cookie.marketingBody: Used to deliver relevant advertising and measure campaign performance.
